titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale Drama Alumni Association Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Monday January 7, 2019 at 08:55
finding aid revisiion description not supplied

did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence, minutes, reports and manuals documenting the operations and activities of the Yale Drama Alumni Association.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 22-G (YRG 22-G), Records of the Yale School of Drama student, alumni, and support organizations.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale Drama Alumni Association Records (RU 80). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence, minutes, reports and manuals documenting the operations and activities of the Yale Drama Alumni Association.

subject.part: Universities and colleges -- Alumni and alumnae

corpname.part: Yale University ( Alumni and alumnae) -- Alumni and alumnae
Yale University ( Societies, etc.) -- Societies, etc.

did.unittitle: Records concerning the Yale Drama Alumni Association
Report to Yale Alumni on Alumni Activities
YDS- Dean Search Committee '78-Newsletters- Yale Ads
AYA Assembly XIV- AYA Nominations-AYA Communiques
Fall Get-Together NYC, Yale Christmas Party
Report of AYA Committee on the Arts, 60th Anniversary, Cole Porter
